Snoozy sells through e-commerce and in over 1,000 retail stores nationwide, and we are rapidly expanding across wholesale, retail, and new product categories. As we scale, maintaining a strong and consistent brand a
score_reason: Senior CD title and remote confirmed, but wellness/CPG product focus (not advertising campaigns, brand strategy, or creative tech) and missing timezone/location details disqualify from strong consideration.

title: Creative Director
description:
We are building AI to simulate the world through merging art and science.

We believe that world models are at the frontier of progress in artificial intelligence. Language models alone won’t solve the world’s hardest problems – robotics, disease, scientific discovery. Real progress requires models that experience the world and learn from their mistakes, the same way that humans do. And this kind of trial and error can be massively accelerated when done in simulation, rather than in the real world.

World models offer the most clear path to general-purpose simulation, changing how stories are
score_reason: Senior creative leadership at cutting-edge generative AI platform (perfect domain fit), 100% remote, USD compensation in Travis's range, but title ambiguity and lack of explicit advertising/brand focus prevents perfect 10.

title: Creative Director (Freelance, As-Needed, Remote)
description:
Firebrand Design & Business Solutions is a fast-growing, full-service graphic design agency based in the United States. Firebrand is known for its core services including presentation design, website design & development, marketing and sales collateral design, branding and logos, event support, and more. We are a team of friendly, driven go-getters who love all aspects of design and are passionate about our mission to help other businesses succeed.

We value high design, agility, a passion for learning and growing, open and honest communication, and doing what is right no matter the cost. Comp
score_reason: Senior CD title and remote work meet criteria, but freelance/as-needed structure, no compensation listed, vague scope (graphic design agency vs. advertising/brand strategy focus), and incomplete job description suggest poor fit for full-time senior leadership role.

The role is designed for a self-motivated professional capable of delivering results quickly.

score_reason: Senior creative leadership role with integrated brand work, but no salary disclosed, no remote confirmation, no timezone info, and incomplete job description raises too many red flags.
